news_results.title: Walmart Connect Expands Self-Serve Ad Platform for SMBs
news_results.snippet: Walmart Connect announced the expansion of its self-serve advertising platform, giving small and medium-sized businesses access to sponsored search placements across Walmart.com.

news_results.title: Walmart & Roku Partner on Shoppable TV Ads
news_results.snippet: Walmart Connect and Roku have inked a partnership to deliver shoppable TV ads that let viewers purchase products directly from their screens using Walmart's checkout.

news_results.title: Retail Media Q1 2026 Roundup: Winners & Losers
news_results.snippet: Retail media networks continue to grow rapidly. Walmart Connect posted strong Q1 numbers, while Amazon Advertising maintained its lead in sponsored product placements.
